title: thyselium palustre
intro: Thyselium palustre, also known as bog bean, is a perennial plant species in the family Polygalaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with urinary tract infections. Thyselium palustre can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
